name: Oven-Barbecued Turkey Legs
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour with salt, chili powder, and pepper; dredge turkey legs in the flour mixture.
2. Heat oil in a large skillet; brown turkey, turning to brown all sides.
3. Remove turkey to a 13x9x2-inch pan.
4. Combine barbecue sauce, water, and bouillon cube; spoon over turkey.
5. Cover pan with foil; bake at 325°F oven for 1 hour.
6. Uncover and bake for 1 hour, until turkey is tender, basting frequently.
NOTE: Delicious teamed with pan-baked potato halves, fresh zucchini, and a hot peach or pear half!
